name: Chocolate Nut Upside-Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a small saucepan. Stir in brown sugar.
2. Heat until bubbly. Stir in corn syrup and cream; heat, stirring constantly, just to boiling.
3. Add nuts. Pour into a well-greased 10-inch bundt pan. Set aside while preparing the cake.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
6. Mix butter and sugar until well combined. Add egg yolks, melted chocolate, and vanilla; mix well.
7. Add flour mixture alternately with milk. Beat egg whites until stiff.
8. Fold in the beaten egg whites into the cake batter.
9. Spoon over the nut mixture in the pan.
10. Bake for 35-45 minutes or until tested done. Cool for 15 minutes, then remove from the pan.
